    sysutils/thefish: Update to 0.6.8

    Remove options because can choose between GTK2 and Qt3, Qt3 is
    outdated.
    Project moves to codeberg.
    Switch to DISTVERSION.
    Add LICENSE_FILE.

    PR:             279282
    Approved by:    Submitter is maintainer
